SocketExtensionsHandleSocketT Method (T, FuncISocketRequest, Task)

One Identity Manager API Server
Registers a web socket handler for the specified API method.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Socket
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public static IMethodVerb HandleSocket<T>(
	this T method,
	Func<ISocketRequest, Task> handler
)
where T : IMethod

Parameters

method
Type: T
handler
Type: SystemFuncISocketRequest, Task
Action to call when a web socket request is being processed, returning a task that completes when socket processing ends.

Type Parameters

T

Return Value

Type: IMethodVerb

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type . When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
Remarks
This method will not call code to receive or send data. Note that the socket is closed by the server when the session is disposed, or when the server shuts down.
